basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Scientist, Field Investigator and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) Contractual Manpower Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website www.aiimsdeoghar.edu.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: As per GOI norms for SC/ST/OBC; relaxable up to 5 years for Government servants and SC/ST/OBC for Administrative Officer.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Health Economics, Economics, Public Health, or Community Medicine, MD/MS/DNB/MPH after MBBS, Ph.D. in Microbiology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology or related field, Bachelor's Degree with 3 years experience in Government Department, Graduate in Science/relevant subject with 3 years work experience, Master's degree in relevant subject or Pharm D
qualification.details: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): Master's degree in Health Economics, Economics, Public Health, or Community Medicine with specialization in Healthcare Costing and Economic Evaluation. Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: Medical: MD/MS/DNB/MPH after MBBS with 6 years research experience or MBBS with 8 years experience or equivalent. Non-Medical: Ph.D. in Microbiology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology or related field with 5 years R&D/Teaching experience or equivalent. Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: Medical: MBBS with 6 years experience or Postgraduate Diploma after MBBS with 5 years experience or MD/MS/DNB/MPH after MBBS with 4 years research experience. Non-Medical: M.Sc. Life Sciences/MPH/MHA/M.Pharm/Pharm D with 4 years experience. Administrative Officer: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience in Government Department/Statutory Body/Autonomous Body/University/Public Sector Undertaking or Retired Officers of the rank of Section Officer/Under Secretary to the Government of India. Field Officer: Graduate in Science/relevant subject with 3 years work experience or Master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D from a recognized institution. Field Investigator: Graduate in Science/relevant subject with 3 years work experience or Master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D from a recognized institution.

salary_details.details: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): ₹67,000/- + HRA Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: ₹78,000/- + HRA Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: ₹67,000/- + HRA Administrative Officer: ₹40,000/- Field Officer: ₹25,000/- – ₹30,000/- Field Investigator: ₹30,000/- – ₹32,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Deoghar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.aiimsdeoghar.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Deoghar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Deoghar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Deoghar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): Master's degree in Health Economics, Economics, Public Health, or Community Medicine with specialization in Healthcare Costing and Economic Evaluation. Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: Medical: MD/MS/DNB/MPH after MBBS with 6 years research experience or MBBS with 8 years experience or equivalent. Non-Medical: Ph.D. in Microbiology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology or related field with 5 years R&D/Teaching experience or equivalent. Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: Medical: MBBS with 6 years experience or Postgraduate Diploma after MBBS with 5 years experience or MD/MS/DNB/MPH after MBBS with 4 years research experience. Non-Medical: M.Sc. Life Sciences/MPH/MHA/M.Pharm/Pharm D with 4 years experience. Administrative Officer: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience in Government Department/Statutory Body/Autonomous Body/University/Public Sector Undertaking or Retired Officers of the rank of Section Officer/Under Secretary to the Government of India. Field Officer: Graduate in Science/relevant subject with 3 years work experience or Master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D from a recognized institution. Field Investigator: Graduate in Science/relevant subject with 3 years work experience or Master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D from a recognized institution.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: As per GOI norms for SC/ST/OBC; relaxable up to 5 years for Government servants and SC/ST/OBC for Administrative Officer.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): ₹67,000/- + HRA Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: ₹78,000/- + HRA Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: ₹67,000/- + HRA Administrative Officer: ₹40,000/- Field Officer: ₹25,000/- – ₹30,000/- Field Investigator: ₹30,000/- – ₹32,000/-

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Deoghar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.aiimsdeoghar.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the Contractual Manpower Positions at AIIMS Deoghar is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AIIMS Deoghar has announced a total of 6 vacancies for various Contractual Manpower Positions. These include roles like Health Economist, Scientist D, Scientist C, Administrative Officer, Field Officer, and Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to AIIMS Deoghar posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Contractual Manpower Positions is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Contractual Manpower Positions at AIIMS Deoghar will involve a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview. Candidates need to clear all stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with required documents to the specified address via post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the salary ranges for the posts advertised by AIIMS Deoghar?
faq.answer: The salary varies depending on the post. For instance, Field Officer can earn between ₹25,000 to ₹30,000 per month, while Scientist D can draw up to ₹78,000/- + HRA per month. The overall range is from ₹25,000 to ₹78,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply for multiple posts in AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly state whether candidates can apply for multiple posts. It is advisable to check the detailed notification or contact the recruitment authority for clarification on this matter.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Deoghar. A direct link to the notification PDF is also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What qualifications are required for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Administrative Officer position, candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree or equivalent with a minimum of 3 years of experience in a Government Department, Statutory Body, Autonomous Body, University, or Public Sector Undertaking. Retired Officers of the rank of Section Officer/Under Secretary are also eligible.
